findings.title: XOR-based fake DES encryption
findings.description: Function named des_ecb_xor implements simple repeating-key XOR instead of real DES encryption

findings.title: Hardcoded encryption key
findings.description: Encryption key hardcoded as plaintext character array in source code

findings.title: Custom non-cryptographic hash functions replacing MD5/SHA-1
findings.description: Custom hash functions named md5_simple and sha1_simple use weak multiplicative hashing instead of real algorithms

findings.title: Weak hash used for data integrity signatures
findings.description: Integrity signatures computed using custom weak hash with simple concatenation

findings.title: Predictable session token generation via rand()
findings.description: Session tokens generated using rand() seeded with time(NULL)

findings.title: Predictable API token generation
findings.description: API tokens generated by hashing predictable sequential counter and timestamp values
